name: ASURE SOFTWARE INC
summary: Asure Software is a provider of cloud-based Human Capital Management (HCM) software delivered as SaaS to businesses of all sizes across the United States. Its core Asure HCM platform includes Payroll & Tax filing, HR management, Time & Attendance, Recruiting, and Benefits Administration. The company serves over 100,000 clients directly and through a national network of Reseller Partners who white label its solutions, with approximately 35% direct and 65% indirect clients.
